description: When a GCVector held by WeakCache stored deferred references to a TypedArray buffer that was later detached during a setElement valueOf callback under gczeal(9), the existing needsSweep() method (which only reported emptiness, not sweep need) fell through to the GCPolicy path without sweeping, leaving the typed array pointing at a detached ArrayBuffer — hitting !obj->hasDetachedBuffer() at TypedArrayObject.cpp:1021. sec-high GC/buffer-detach assert. Fix: replace WeakCache::needsSweep with empty() and add a proper sweep path for GCPolicy (git a05bddc2ecd5, jcoppeard, 2021-10-18).
